BASE.name: ATTACK_VECTOR
BASE.justification: The issue can be exploited remotely because polyfill.io script reference used.

BASE.name: ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
BASE.justification: No special conditions are required to exploit this issue.

BASE.name: PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
BASE.justification: No authentication required to exploit (public Visualforce pages).

BASE.name: USER_INTERACTION
BASE.justification: User must visit or interact with the affected page.

BASE.name: SCOPE
BASE.justification: External script execution affects the broader application context.

BASE.name: CONFIDENTIALITY
BASE.justification: Data exfiltration possible through malicious scripts.

BASE.name: INTEGRITY
BASE.justification: Scripts can alter or inject harmful behavior into the app.

TEMPORAL.name: EXPLOIT_CODE_MATURITY
TEMPORAL.justification: Known exploitation methods exist via public CDN manipulation.

TEMPORAL.name: REPORT_CONFIDENCE
TEMPORAL.justification: The issue is clearly identified by static analysis.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: No authentication required to exploit (public Visualforce pages).

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_USER_INTERACTION
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: User must visit or interact with the affected page.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_SCOPE
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: External script execution affects the broader application context.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_CONFIDENTIALITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Data exfiltration possible through malicious scripts.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_INTEGRITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Scripts can alter or inject harmful behavior into the app.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: AVAILABILITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Not primary, but disruption is still possible.
